content:
## Referral Classification
The Green Fee-Free Account referral offer applies to the personal_checking category. Use this article when the referred customer is opening a Green Fee-Free Account and the referral should be evaluated against that account's own reward terms. For the broader comparison set, see "Personal Checking Referral Programs"; for limit handling across referral offers, see "Referral Limits And Eligibility".

## Reward Amounts
- Referrer reward: 20 after the qualifying referral conditions are met.
- Referred customer reward: 35 after the referred customer satisfies the deposit requirement.
- Minimum referred-customer deposit: 300.

Do not substitute the Green Fee-Free Account amounts for another checking product, even when the customer describes the account as fee-free or personal checking. Match the account name first, then apply these terms.

## Eligibility Rules
1. The referrer has no tenure waiting period for this offer; the required tenure is 0.
2. The referred customer must make at least the minimum referred deposit of 300 for the referred bonus to apply.
3. The annual referral cap for this account is 10. Once that cap applies, do not promise additional Green Fee-Free Account referral rewards for the same annual period.

## Handling Notes
If the account type is unclear, ask the customer to confirm whether the referral is for a Green Fee-Free Account before quoting reward amounts. If the customer is comparing Green Fee-Free Account with Blue Account Terms or Light Green Account Terms, keep the reward amounts and caps tied to the selected account rather than blending terms across products.
title: Green Fee-Free Account Referral Terms
